query: Screen recordings that edit themselves complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Best Screen Recording Apps (2026): Ranked & Reviewed
results.content:
## Loom

Best for free, under-5-minute screen recordings

What used to be the gold standard for screen recording, async team collaboration, and light video editing, has turned into a bloated and frustrating tool. If you're willing to actually invest in a modern screen recording solution, use Supercut instead.

Loom

### What is Loom?

Loom

Loom used to be the gold standard for the best screen recording software and internal collaboration, but it has been upended by Supercut recently.

After Atlassian acquired Loom back in October 2023, it just became more bloated, constantly crashing, with a constant push to upgrade to their "AI tier", which is quite basic and unremarkable features. [...] It's a small thing, but it changes how people interact with videos. There's even a cute keyboard shortcut ("c") that makes leaving comments speedy.

For client-facing teams, CTAs are insanely simple and useful. You can add a clear next step at the end of any video. It removes that awkward gap where someone watches your video and then… does nothing. It's a simple feature that pushes your viewers to book a call or review something.

#### Editing

The editor is amazing! It feels more like editing text than editing video. You highlight what you don't want, cut it, and move on. You can trim silences, clean things up, adjust layouts, and make quick improvements without having to re-record (which takes so much time). [...] Then we saw someone else's demo video on Twitter and were blown away with how sleek it looked. Our first impression was "Wow, how did they film and edit that? That's so cool!". When finding out that Screen Studio was actually a software that actually automatically edits the screen recording by following your cursor, and zooming in on the screen when you click, we knew it had to be a part of our arsenal. We also wanted our videos to have that elevated look 👀

You can even edit your videos easily after the recording for vertical video platforms like YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram, and Twitter.

We'd go as far as saying this is the best tool on the market for professional screen recording.

It is currently only available on macOS.

Superhuman Mail

results.title: Screen Studio for Mac Review
results.content:
Recordings would randomly stop in the middle of an important demo
 Audio would either not record at all or sound like it was recorded underwater
 My computer would slow to a crawl while recording
 Videos looked pixelated and unprofessional
 Editing was a complete nightmare

Sound familiar? These are exactly the problems Screen Studio fixes, and that’s why I decided to write this comprehensive review - to help others who are probably pulling their hair out with the same issues.

results.title: The 10 Best Screen Recorders | TechSmith
results.content:
As an all-in-one solution, Camtasia Editor combines screen recording with a powerful built-in editor, saving time and effort.

A key feature of Camtasia Editor is its multi-track timeline. This allows users to layer screen recordings, audio, images, and video clips effortlessly.

You can also edit individual elements, like cursor movements, with precision. Highlighting, magnifying, or smoothing cursor paths makes videos more engaging—perfect for tutorials and demos.

Camtasia Editor offers many editing tools, including transitions, animations, callouts, and customizable templates. The drag-and-drop editor keeps things simple, letting you create professional videos without a steep learning curve. [...] ## Go from screen recording to polished video

A screen recording is just the start. Camtasia’s editor helps you add the callouts, animations, and edits you need to create a truly professional video.

An image of a laptop showing the camtasia drag-and-drop editing feature
An image of a laptop showing the camtasia drag-and-drop editing feature

Camtasia Editor pros:

Camtasia Editor cons:

Camtasia Editor is the best all-in-one screen recorder for professionals who need to record, edit, and publish without switching tools. Camtasia Editor is a top tool for creating professional-quality screen recordings and videos. Its intuitive interface makes it easy for beginners to use, while advanced features let experienced users create polished content. [...] Before you record, you can choose the balance of your camera and screen content and emphasize one over the other depending on the content you are creating. There are endless layout options so you’re sure to find one that fits your needs. Camtasia Online is built with versatility and simplicity in mind.

Once you’re done recording your scenes, Camtasia Online offers editing features such as background removal and borders for your recording. These help to make videos look professional and polished in no time.

If you are looking for a more extensive editing suite, you can actually sync your videos to Camtasia Editor to edit further. This integration is simple to use and can take your video one step further if you need.

results.title: Gnome 48 screen recording broken - Help - NixOS Discourse
results.content:
This is the result of `journalctl --user -f` after launching gnome screenshot tool for screen recording [...] # Gnome 48 screen recording broken

Hello,  
After updating to NixOS 25.05 all screen recording and screen sharing on gnome is broken.  
It creates single frame stream that doesnt change, and confuses video players.

In the meantime I will downgrade to NixOS 24.11 but if I am the only one experiencing this issue I’m willing to help with debug logs because I need this fixed for my work.

# System Details Report

Hi,

Thank you for your feedback.

We're honestly not sure what issue you're referring to. ScreenRec has not removed any free features, locked existing functionality, or changed ownership of the application in a way that would require users to "rent" it.

The red dot in Settings is simply used to highlight newly released features or options so users can easily discover them. It is not related to missing features, subscriptions, or upgrade requirements, and it normally disappears after some time. [...] Reply from screenrec.com

Jun 21, 2026

Hi,

We’re sorry to hear that you were unhappy with your experience, but we need to clarify that the claims in this review are not accurate.

ScreenRec is legitimate screen recording software. It does not contain viruses, spyware, malware, scam adverts, or anything designed to harm users or help scammers. The message you described about “your computer has a virus” is not part of ScreenRec.

If the ScreenRec floating menu appears again after restarting your computer, this usually means the app is enabled to launch on startup. That does not mean the software is dangerous or impossible to remove. ScreenRec can be uninstalled normally through the standard uninstall process in your operating system. [...] If this is what you're referring to, we'd appreciate the opportunity to better understand your experience. Please contact our support team and send us a screenshot of the red dot or the message you were seeing so we can investigate further.

Thank you for trying ScreenRec.

— The ScreenRec Team
